grok.verification_method: Live hooks captured from sanitized empty workspaces; raw payloads remained outside the repository. Re-probed on 2026-07-16 with Grok Build 0.2.101 for unobserved lifecycle hooks and subagent identity (#1299, #1300).

field_availability.transcript_path: present on prompt, tool, stop, and compact events; absent on SessionStart
field_availability.model: unavailable on every observed hook payload
field_availability.tool_result: present on PostToolUse; failed and denied reads are nested result variants
field_availability.failure_details: no top-level failure field observed; FileNotFound and PermissionDenied are nested PostToolUse result variants
field_availability.compact_summary: unavailable; compact hooks expose source and transcriptPath only
field_availability.subagent_parent_id: unavailable: Grok Build 0.2.101 still did not emit SubagentStart/SubagentStop hooks; subagents appear as spawn_subagent tool audits without a dedicated parent/child hook payload

SessionStart.note: source=new; no transcriptPath or model field

UserPromptSubmit.note: prompt, promptId, and transcriptPath are present

PostToolUse.note: Missing and sandbox-denied reads still emit PostToolUse with FileNotFound or PermissionDenied result variants.

PostToolUseFailure.note: Not emitted by missing-file probes on 0.2.99 or re-probe 0.2.101 (2026-07-16); FileNotFound arrived through PostToolUse.toolResult instead.

PermissionDenied.note: Standalone PermissionDenied hook still not observed on 0.2.101 re-probe; denials arrive as nested PostToolUse result variants when present.

Stop.note: Turn boundary with promptId, reason, and transcriptPath; no assistant body or model field.

StopFailure.note: No API failure was intentionally induced in the live probe.

SubagentStart.note: 2026-07-16 re-probe (Grok 0.2.101, plan mode): spawning a subagent used the spawn_subagent tool and produced PostToolUse audits only. No SubagentStart hook payload was delivered, so no parent/child identity contract is claimed and Traceary does not synthesize one.

SubagentStop.note: 2026-07-16 re-probe: no SubagentStop hook observed after spawn_subagent tool use. Parent/child enrichment remains unavailable.

Notification.note: Notification has no Traceary lifecycle mapping and was not included in the live contract probe.

PreCompact.note: Manual compact marker; no summary body is exposed.

PostCompact.note: Manual compact completion marker; no summary body is exposed.

SessionEnd.note: Not emitted on headless print completion in 0.2.99 or re-probe 0.2.101 (2026-07-16); Stop remains a turn boundary.
